titleStmt.title: SII 37.443: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 443. (A.R. No. E 55 of 1941-42.) Vāḍapalli, Suryapet Taluk, Nalgonda District.

summary.p: On a slab set up outside the temple of Narasiṁhasvāmi.
This is dated Śaka 1528, Plavaṅga, Phālguṇa, ba. 5, Thursday, corresponding to 1608 A.D., February 25, f.d.t. 03.

It records the Bhaṭlu hailing from the sīmas of Dēvarakoṇḍa, Koṇḍavīḍu, Nallagoṇḍa, Uṇḍrakoṇḍa, Koṇḍapalli, Ōrugallu, Anantagiri, Bellamkoṇḍa, Vinikoṇḍa, Nāgārjunikoṇḍa, Tangeḍa, Gurijāla, Kārampūṇḍi, Tumurugōḍu, Kētavaram, Pērūru, Dēvalapalle, Nāgulapāḍu and Vajirābād who had come to Vōḍapalli, for the marriages of the Kōmaṭis made a permanent endownment of a portion of their incomes (Pamji payikālu) to god Narasimha at the request of Jānumailu Vīrappa. Similarly the Kōmaṭis also agreed to pay to the god a sum of one māḍa and 1 tūmu of rice on the occasion of each marriage.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīnarasiṁhāyanamaḥ . svasti śrī jayābhyuda
ya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1528 Agu
nēṭi plavaṁga saṁvvatsara phālguṇa ba 5 guruvāraṁnāṁḍu
dēvarakoṁḍḍa koṁḍḍavīḍu nallagoṁḍḍavuṁḍṛ koṁḍḍa koṁḍḍapalli
vōrugallu Anaṁttagiri bellaṁkoṁḍḍa vinikoṁḍḍa nāgārjuni koṁ
ḍḍa taṁggeḍa gurijāla kāreṁpūṁḍi tumurugoḍu kētavaraṁ perū
ru dēvulapalli gāgulapāḍu va bāḍasīma samadēśālabhaṭlu
vōḍapalli kōmaṭi peṁḍliṁḍlaku vacci naraśiṁhvuni saṁnnidhini vuṁ
nnajānu mailu vīrappa viṁnnapaṁ cēśina vivaraṁ . kōmaṭi peṁḍliṁḍla
ku mīku yicce paṁjjipayikālu śrīlakṣmi narasiṁhvulaku
nitya naivēdya dīpārādhanalaku samarpiṁccumani manavi ce
ppitenu Ālāge bhāgyaṁ Āyanani yediriṁcci cēśina peṁḍli
ki varahani yiddumu biyyamuṁnnu guttajaṭṭi peṁḍliki
mādānu tūmeḍu biyyamuṁnnu guttajaṭṭi peṁḍliki
mādānu tūmeḍu biyyamuṁnnu samadēśālaku pu
ṇyamugānu kōmaṭlanu yiṁmmani śrīlakṣmīnarasiṁhvu
laku samarppiṁcciri . yiṁdduku mā samadēśālavāru yavva
ru tappinānu kāśilō gōvu brāṁhmani vadhiṁccina pāpāna bō
vuvāru kriṣṇāgarbhamaṁddu tamatallidaṁḍrādula guruvula
vadhiyiṁccina pāpāna bōvuvāru . yī kaṭṭaḍi cēśina maryada
nu kōmaṭlu Iyyaka tappirāyanā kāśilō gōvu brāṁhmani vadhi
yiṁccina pāpānabōvuvāru kriṣṇāgarbhamaṁddu tamatalidaṁḍrādu
lavadhiyiṁccina pāpāna bōvuvāru . Ēkaivabhagini lōke sa
rvēṣāṁyeva bhūbhujaṁ . nabhōgyaṁ na karagrāṁhya viṣṇudattā va
suṁdharāṁ yiḍupulapāṭi mādirāju narasayya vrāśina
dharma śāsanaṁ . dānapālanayormmadhyē dānāccrēyōnupā
lanaṁ . dānātsvarggamavāpnōti . pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ .
śāsāna vrāśinavāṁḍu Aḍi śarlapalli voḍapalli . śrī śrī
śrī śrī śrī jeyunū . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 37.443 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
